title: F1 Bros Modpack
description: This is the Modpack for the F1 Bros League Server.
body:
This is the Modpack for the F1 Bros League Server.

This is a modpack with a few mods and is designed solely to simplify the construction of large structures. It's easier to obtain large quantities of blocks, and the ME system makes it easier to access all chests.

It Adds a lot of the Create Mods, AE2, Techreborn and Minecraft Transit Railway. There are also a few mods to have a bit of fun (like Do a Barrel Roll or Immersive Aircraft) and to be able to build more beautifully (example Modern Glass Doors).
